name: Sunfun Info Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunfun Info Co., Ltd. operates online dating and social networking services in Taiwan, the United States, Mexico, India, and the Southeast Asia. The company offers iPair, weTouch, and SweetRing websites that are dating applications; information software services; and other online platform services. It also engages in the biotechnology and healthcare business. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
